name: Shenzhen Wenke Landscape Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Wenke Landscape Co., Ltd. engages in planning and designing landscape architectures in China. It operates through Design and R&D, Landscape and Engineering, Eco-Environment, PPP Investment, and Cultural Tourism divisions. The company is involved in the research and development of ecological technology and sponge city; and tourism planning and design. It also engages in the garden landscape projects, municipal public works, and landscape architecture projects; and water environment management, human settlements remediation, and soil pollution remediation activities. In addition, the company invests and finances PPP projects; and invests, constructs, and operates Flower Expo parks. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
